summary.en: Luxembourg grid operator Creos requires PV inverters to comply with IEC 62116 (anti-islanding), IEC 61727 (utility-interconnection interface), EN 50549-1:2019 / EN 50549-2:2019, and Commission Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (RfG Network Code). Luxembourg operates at 230 V / 400 V (3-phase) at 50 Hz. ILR oversees energy market regulation. Firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, and voltage windows must be validated for 230/400 V.
summary.zh: 卢森堡电网运营商Creos要求光伏逆变器符合IEC 62116（防孤岛）、IEC 61727（并网接口）、EN 50549-1:2019/EN 50549-2:2019及欧盟法规2016/631（RfG电网规范）。卢森堡电压为230 V/400 V（三相）50 Hz。ILR负责能源市场监管。固件保护阈值、重连延时和电压窗口须针对230/400 V进行验证。
summary.zht: 盧森堡電網運營商Creos要求光伏逆變器符合IEC 62116（防孤島）、IEC 61727（併網接口）、EN 50549-1:2019/EN 50549-2:2019及歐盟法規2016/631（RfG電網規範）。盧森堡電壓為230 V/400 V（三相）50 Hz。ILR負責能源市場監管。韌體保護閾值、重連延時和電壓窗口須針對230/400 V進行驗證。

summary.en: GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004-2018, and GB/T 37408-2021 govern Chinese PV inverter grid connection. GB/T 156 specifies Chinese grid voltage as 220/380 V 50 Hz. Chinese grid-connection documents are not accepted by Creos or ILR.
summary.zh: GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004-2018和GB/T 37408-2021规范中国光伏逆变器并网要求。GB/T 156规定中国电网电压为220/380 V 50 Hz。中国并网文件不被Creos或ILR认可。
summary.zht: GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004-2018和GB/T 37408-2021規範中國光伏逆變器併網要求。GB/T 156規定中國電網電壓為220/380 V 50 Hz。中國併網文件不被Creos或ILR認可。

gap.en: China grid documents are not accepted by Creos for Luxembourg project acceptance. Firmware protection thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage windows, and Q(U) reactive power settings must be re-validated for 230/400 V 50 Hz Luxembourg grid. Formal Creos grid-connection application and ILR notification required.
gap.zh: 中国并网文件不被Creos接受用于卢森堡项目验收。固件保护阈值、重连延时、电压窗口和Q(U)无功功率设置须针对230/400 V 50 Hz卢森堡电网重新验证。须正式向Creos提交并网申请并通知ILR。
gap.zht: 中國併網文件不被Creos接受用於盧森堡項目驗收。韌體保護閾值、重連延時、電壓窗口和Q(U)無功功率設置須針對230/400 V 50 Hz盧森堡電網重新驗證。須正式向Creos提交併網申請並通知ILR。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Creos grid-connection approval required before commissioning in Luxembourg
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 19964-2024 and NB/T 32004-2018 mandatory for Chinese grid-connected PV inverters

source.publisher: Creos Luxembourg S.A. — Luxembourg Grid Operator

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese grid-connection documents are not accepted by Creos or ILR. Firmware and protection settings must be re-validated for Luxembourg 230/400 V 50 Hz grid. Formal Creos grid-connection application is required before commissioning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国并网文件不被Creos或ILR认可。固件和保护设置须针对卢森堡230/400 V 50 Hz电网重新验证。投运前须正式向Creos提交并网申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國併網文件不被Creos或ILR認可。韌體和保護設置須針對盧森堡230/400 V 50 Hz電網重新驗證。投運前須正式向Creos提交併網申請。
